read returns null when no value found for key
read returns stored value when has one
writing null deletes value
.frontend.packages.internal.catalyst_voices_shared.test.src.formatter.wallet_address_formatter
WalletAddressFormatter should format ShelleyAddress into short representation
.frontend.packages.internal.catalyst_voices_shared.test.src.keychain.vault_keychain_provider
VaultKeychainProvider exists returns true for existing keychain
VaultKeychainProvider calling create twice on keychain will empty previous data
VaultKeychainProvider create returns empty keychain
VaultKeychainProvider getAll returns keychains without duplicates
VaultKeychainProvider exists returns false when multiple keychains exits but none matches id
VaultKeychainProvider exists returns false when storage is empty

DateTimeExt isSameDateAs
DateTimeExt minusDays
DateTimeExt plusDays

.frontend.packages.internal.catalyst_voices_view_models.test.authentication.display_name
DisplayName validator empty returns error
DisplayName validator correct value returns no errors
DisplayName validator too long value returns error
.frontend.packages.internal.catalyst_voices_view_models.test.campaign.campaign_stage
CampaignStage scheduled campaign resolves to scheduled stage
CampaignStage completed campaign resolves to completed stage
CampaignStage live campaign resolves to live stage
CampaignStage draft campaign resolves to draft stage
.frontend.packages.internal.catalyst_voices_view_models.test.authentication.email

Email validator correct value returns no errors
